research_sources: Levels.fyi for directional company and level comparisons
Offer or interview loop compensation signals
Credible India senior-tech compensation anecdotes from Blind, 6figr, Glassdoor, or AmbitionBox

target_capable_companies.notes: Current company and internal L9-equivalent PMTS/Director paths can meet the 2.5cr+ total compensation target at the right band.
Principal/Director-equivalent senior India packages can meet the 2.5cr+ total compensation target at the right band.
Director and senior AI/platform roles can meet the 2.5cr+ total compensation target at the right band.
Director-level platform/engineering roles can meet the 2.5cr+ total compensation target at the right band.
Senior Manager, Principal, Director, and senior AI/platform infrastructure roles can meet the 2.5cr+ total compensation target at the right band.
Senior infrastructure, platform, security, and distributed-systems roles can meet the 2.5cr+ total compensation target at the right band.
Senior observability, data platform, and engineering leadership roles can meet the 2.5cr+ total compensation target at the right band.
Senior Engineering Director and senior platform/product engineering roles can meet the 2.5cr+ total compensation target at the right band.
Senior Staff, Principal, and senior cloud/platform leadership roles can meet the 2.5cr+ total compensation target at the right band.
Staff-plus infrastructure, AI platform, and production engineering roles can meet the 2.5cr+ total compensation target at the right band when location and sponsorship fit.
Senior staff-plus platform, AIML, and infrastructure roles can meet the 2.5cr+ total compensation target at the right band when location and sponsorship fit.

scoring_notes: Do not mark target-capable companies below target solely because public India medians are sparse or appear lower.
Salesforce, Amazon, Coupang, Mastercard, NVIDIA, Broadcom, Splunk, Docusign, Google, Meta, and Apple are representative examples, not the complete market.
Use public medians as a floor/market signal, not as a hard ceiling for senior Director, Principal, Staff, or Distinguished roles.
If a target-capable company has unclear compensation, keep it in review and record the negotiation question instead of downranking it as below target.
A role at a target-capable company can still be rejected for underleveling, weak scope, location, or poor role fit.

notes: The recruiting goal is to level up, not merely match current title.
Do not downgrade Salesforce PMTS / Principal-equivalent platform ownership into generic Senior Engineer framing.
A role with credible Staff/Principal/Architect scope should remain high-priority even when exact cross-company level mapping is uncertain.
If a role appears below target level, record the downlevel risk clearly and score it lower unless compensation or company fit is exceptional.
Treat title-to-level mappings as compensation signals, not facts, unless a source explicitly supports the mapping.
When comparing a target company with Salesforce, prefer a Levels.fyi company comparison URL or another visible source in compensation_signals.
Record exact level names when visible; otherwise record the mapping as inferred and add a risk_flag.
Target compensation is total annual compensation, not just base salary.
Avoid both overclaiming and underleveling, but treat underleveling as the more expensive failure mode.

preferred_locations: Global remote open to India or UAE
acceptable_locations: Globally remote roles that explicitly allow India or UAE
excluded_locations: United States roles unless explicit non-H1B sponsorship or relocation support is stated
notes: Candidate does not have H1B; do not prioritize US roles by default.
UAE roles are viable because candidate can self-sponsor.
Any non-India/non-UAE role should record the visible sponsorship or relocation signal in risk_flags or compensation_signals.
